streaming_details.type: Multiple sequential fetch POST requests (NOT SSE, NOT WebSocket, NOT NDJSON)
streaming_details.behavior: Client polls server via repeated syncRecordValuesSpaceInitial POST calls. Each response contains incremental record value updates including AI-generated content blocks. The AI response is assembled client-side from these incremental updates.
streaming_details.request_pattern: ~15-20 syncRecordValues calls during a single AI response generation, interspersed with etClient telemetry calls

chat_input.placeholder: AI로 무엇이든 시도해 보세요... (Try anything with AI...)

errors: Statsig Request encoding failed - InvalidCharacterError: Failed to execute btoa on Window (characters outside Latin1 range)
warnings: Amplitude Logger: Event not tracked, no destination plugins on the instance (multiple)

csp_and_security.service_worker: sw.js serves cached assets, reduces network requests

warning_design_implications.injection_method: CANNOT use SSE/NDJSON stream injection. Must intercept syncRecordValuesSpaceInitial POST responses and modify JSON payload to include warning content as Notion block data, OR inject warning via HTTP response replacement on initial page load.
warning_design_implications.recommended_approach: Intercept the initial page load or the syncRecordValuesSpaceInitial API responses. Since Notion uses its own block-based content model, warning must be formatted as Notion-compatible block JSON or injected as a DOM overlay.
warning_design_implications.alternative: Block the entire notion.so/ai endpoint and return a custom error page with warning message.
warning_design_implications.difficulty: HIGH - Notion's proprietary sync protocol and block model make inline warning injection complex. DOM overlay or full-page replacement is more practical.
warning_design_implications.no_websocket: Confirmed: Notion AI does NOT use WebSocket despite initial expectations. Uses fetch-based polling instead.
